mapper.select:
SELECT c.contract_no As contractNo, c.company_name As companyName, s.product_name As productName, s.brand_number As brandNumber, s.factory_name As factoryName, s.warehouse_name As warehouseName, s.product_attr As productAttr, c.long_flg As longFlg, p.deal_number As totalNumber, IF(c1.dealed_amount>=p1.total_price,p1.deal_number,0) As soldNumber, (p.deal_number-(IFNULL(p1.deal_number,0))) As outSoldNumber, (c.dealed_amount*p.total_price/c.total_amount) As dealedAmount, IF(c1.total_amount!='',IF(IFNULL((p1.total_price/c1.total_amount*c1.dealed_amount)>=p.total_price,0), 0,p.total_price-IFNULL((p1.total_price/c1.total_amount*c1.dealed_amount),0)),p.total_price) As occupation, c.match_user_name As matchUserName, c.match_user_id As matchUserId, c.dept_id As deptId, s.spot_type As spotType, c.created_date As createDate FROM t_stock_detail s LEFT JOIN t_ctr_contract c ON s.buy_contract_id = c.id LEFT JOIN t_ctr_product p ON p.id = s.ctr_product_id LEFT JOIN t_ctr_contract_rela r ON r.buy_contract_id = c.id AND r.buy_product_id = p.id LEFT JOIN t_ctr_contract c1 ON r.sell_contract_id = c1.id LEFT JOIN t_ctr_product p1 ON p1.id = r.sell_product_id WHERE c.contract_status != 'C' AND c.enterprise_id = #{enterpriseId} AND c.match_user_id !='' AND (s.delivery_in_number > 0 OR s.available_number > 0 )
ORDER BY s.id DESC
ORDER BY s.id ASC
ORDER BY s.id DESC

SELECT SUM(p.deal_number) AS totalNumber, SUM(IF(c1.dealed_amount>=p1.total_price,p1.deal_number,0)) AS soldNumber, SUM((p.deal_number-(IFNULL(p1.deal_number,0)))) AS outSoldNumber, SUM((c.dealed_amount*p.total_price/c.total_amount)) AS dealedAmount, SUM(IF(c1.total_amount!='',IF(IFNULL((p1.total_price/c1.total_amount*c1.dealed_amount)>=p.total_price,0), 0,p.total_price-IFNULL((p1.total_price/c1.total_amount*c1.dealed_amount),0)),p.total_price)) AS occupation FROM t_stock_detail s LEFT JOIN t_ctr_contract c ON s.buy_contract_id = c.id LEFT JOIN t_ctr_product p ON p.id = s.ctr_product_id LEFT JOIN t_ctr_contract_rela r ON r.buy_contract_id = c.id AND r.buy_product_id = p.id LEFT JOIN t_ctr_contract c1 ON r.sell_contract_id = c1.id LEFT JOIN t_ctr_product p1 ON p1.id = r.sell_product_id WHERE c.contract_status != 'C' AND c.enterprise_id = #{enterpriseId} AND c.match_user_id !='' AND (s.delivery_in_number > 0 OR s.available_number > 0 )

SELECT t.id AS id, c.contract_no AS contractNo, c.contract_attr AS contractAttr, c.contract_time AS contractTime, c.our_company_name As ourCompanyName, t.product_name AS productName, t.brand_number AS brandNumber, t.factory_name AS factoryName, t.buy_company_name AS companyName, p.deal_number AS totalNumber, t.delivery_in_number AS deliveryInNumber, t.delivery_out_number AS deliveryOutNumber, (p.deal_number - t.delivery_out_number) AS surplusNumber, t.apply_no AS warehouseNo, t.warehouse_name AS warehouse, c.match_user_name AS matchUserName, c.dept_id AS deptId FROM t_stock_detail t LEFT JOIN t_ctr_contract c ON t.buy_contract_id = c.id LEFT JOIN t_ctr_product p ON t.ctr_product_id = p.id WHERE c.contract_status != 'C' AND t.enterprise_id = #{enterpriseId}
ORDER BY t.id DESC

SELECT SUM(p.deal_number) As totalNumber, SUM(t.delivery_in_number) As deliveryInNumber, SUM(t.delivery_out_number) As deliveryOutNumber, SUM(p.deal_number - t.delivery_out_number) As surplusNumber FROM t_stock_detail t LEFT JOIN t_ctr_contract c ON t.buy_contract_id = c.id LEFT JOIN t_ctr_product p ON t.ctr_product_id = p.id WHERE c.contract_status != 'C' AND t.enterprise_id = #{enterpriseId}

sql.if: AND (s.frozen_number > 0 OR s.available_number > 0) AND (s.available_number > s.delivery_in_number OR s.available_number > s.delivery_out_number)
AND s.available_number <> 0 AND s.delivery_out_number=s.delivery_in_number AND s.delivery_in_number = s.available_number

mapper.select:
SELECT s.id AS id, s.stock_id As stockId, s.product_name AS productName, s.product_cd As productCd, s.brand_number As brandNumber, s.factory_id As factoryId, s.factory_name As factoryName, s.warehouse_name AS warehouseName, s.frozen_number AS frozenNumber, s.available_number As availableNumber, s.product_attr As productAttr, s.stock_status As stockStatus, s.remark As remark, s.enterprise_id As enterpriseId, s.created_date As createdDate, s.updated_date As updatedDate, s.warehouse_id As warehouseId, s.buy_contract_id As buyContractId, s.sell_contract_id As sellContractId, s.close_flg As closeFlg, s.sell_price As sellPrise, s.delivery_in_number As deliveryInNumber, s.delivery_out_number As deliveryOutNumber, s.business_no As businessNo, s.sell_contract_cfs As sellContractCfs, s.biz_user_id As bizUserId, s.biz_user_name As bizUserName, s.apply_no As applyNo, s.deal_price AS dealPrice, s.warehouse_position As warehousePosition, s.warehouse_batch_no As warehouseBatchNo, s.presell_number As presellNumber, s.ctr_product_id As ctrProductId, s.link_stock_detail_id As linkStockDetailId, s.buy_company_id As buyCompanyId, s.buy_company_name As buyCompanyName, s.source AS source, s.stock_type AS stockType, s.spot_type AS spotType, c.contract_no As contractNo, c.our_company_name As ourCompanyName, c.dept_id As deptId FROM t_stock_detail s LEFT JOIN t_ctr_contract c ON s.buy_contract_id = c.id WHERE s.enterprise_id = #{enterpriseId}
ORDER BY s.updated_date DESC

SELECT SUM(s.delivery_in_number) As deliveryInNumber, SUM(s.delivery_out_number) As deliveryOutNumber, SUM(s.available_number) As availableNumber, SUM(s.frozen_number) As frozenNumber FROM t_stock_detail s LEFT JOIN t_ctr_contract c ON s.buy_contract_id = c.id WHERE s.enterprise_id = #{enterpriseId}

SELECT s.id As id, s.product_name As productName, s.product_cd As productCd, s.brand_number As brandNumber, s.factory_id As factoryId, s.factory_name As factoryName, s.warehouse_name As warehouseName, s.average_price As averagePrice, s.total_number As totalNumber, s.frozen_number As frozenNumber, s.real_number As realNumber, s.product_attr As productAttr FROM t_stock s WHERE 1=1 and EXISTS( SELECT 1 from t_stock_detail d LEFT JOIN t_ctr_contract c on c.id = d.buy_contract_id WHERE s.id = d.stock_id
AND c.our_company_name = #{ourCompanyName}
AND 1=1 )
AND s.product_cd = #{productCd}
AND s.brand_number LIKE CONCAT('%',#{brandNumber},'%')
AND (s.frozen_number > 0 OR s.real_number > 0)
AND s.frozen_number = 0 AND s.real_number = 0
AND s.factory_name LIKE CONCAT('%',#{factoryName},'%')
AND s.warehouse_name LIKE CONCAT('%',#{warehouseName},'%')
AND s.enterprise_id = #{enterpriseId} ORDER BY s.id DESC

SELECT SUM(s.total_number) As totalNumber, SUM(s.frozen_number) As frozenNumber, SUM(s.real_number) AS realNumber FROM t_stock s WHERE 1=1 and EXISTS( SELECT 1 from t_stock_detail d LEFT JOIN t_ctr_contract c on c.id = d.buy_contract_id WHERE 1=1
AND c.our_company_name =#{ourCompanyName}
AND s.id = d.stock_id)
AND s.product_cd = #{productCd}
AND s.brand_number LIKE CONCAT('%',#{brandNumber},'%')
AND (s.frozen_number > 0 OR s.real_number > 0)
AND s.frozen_number = 0 AND s.real_number = 0
AND s.factory_name LIKE CONCAT('%',#{factoryName},'%')
AND s.warehouse_name LIKE CONCAT('%',#{warehouseName},'%')
AND s.enterprise_id = #{enterpriseId} ORDER BY s.id DESC

SELECT d.id As id, d.product_name As productName, d.product_cd As productCd, d.brand_number As brandNumber, d.factory_name As factoryName, d.warehouse_name As warehouseName, d.warehouse_addr As warehouseAddr, d.buy_contract_id As buyContractId, d.available_number As availableNumber, d.delivery_in_number As deliveryInNumber, d.delivery_out_number As deliveryOutNumber, d.ctr_product_id As ctrProductId, d.stock_contract_id As stockContractId, c.contract_no As buyContractNo, c.our_company_name As ourCompanyName,
p.cur_approve_number as curApproveNumber,
d.buy_company_name As buyCompanyName, d.biz_user_name As buyBizUserName FROM t_stock_detail d LEFT JOIN t_ctr_contract c on d.buy_contract_id = c.id LEFT JOIN t_bs_warehouse w ON d.warehouse_id=w.id
LEFT JOIN t_ctr_product p on p.id=#{ctrProductId}
WHERE 1=1 AND d.delivery_in_number > d.delivery_out_number
AND d.product_cd = #{productCd}
AND (d.brand_number LIKE CONCAT('%',#{brandNumber},'%') OR d.brand_number is null OR d.brand_number = '')
AND d.factory_name LIKE CONCAT('%',#{factoryName},'%')
AND d.warehouse_name LIKE CONCAT('%',#{warehouseName},'%')
AND d.stock_contract_id = #{stockContractId}
AND d.enterprise_id = #{enterpriseId} ORDER BY d.id DESC

SELECT s.id AS id, s.stock_id As stockId, s.product_name AS productName, s.product_cd As productCd, s.brand_number As brandNumber, s.factory_id As factoryId, s.factory_name As factoryName, s.warehouse_name AS warehouseName, s.frozen_number AS frozenNumber, s.available_number As availableNumber, s.product_attr As productAttr, s.stock_status As stockStatus, s.remark As remark, s.enterprise_id As enterpriseId, s.created_date As createdDate, s.updated_date As updatedDate, s.warehouse_id As warehouseId, s.buy_contract_id As buyContractId, s.sell_contract_id As sellContractId, s.close_flg As closeFlg, s.sell_price As sellPrise, s.delivery_in_number As deliveryInNumber, s.delivery_out_number As deliveryOutNumber, s.business_no As businessNo, s.sell_contract_cfs As sellContractCfs, s.biz_user_id As bizUserId, s.biz_user_name As bizUserName, s.apply_no As applyNo, s.deal_price AS dealPrice, s.warehouse_position As warehousePosition, s.warehouse_batch_no As warehouseBatchNo, s.presell_number As presellNumber, s.ctr_product_id As ctrProductId, s.link_stock_detail_id As linkStockDetailId, s.buy_company_id As buyCompanyId, s.buy_company_name As buyCompanyName, s.source AS source, s.stock_type AS stockType, s.spot_type AS spotType, c.contract_no As contractNo, c.our_company_name As ourCompanyName, c.dept_id As deptId FROM t_stock_detail s LEFT JOIN t_ctr_contract c ON s.buy_contract_id = c.id LEFT JOIN t_stock_contract_rela r ON s.stock_contract_id = r.stock_contract_id LEFT JOIN t_ctr_contract c1 ON r.contract_id = c1.id LEFT JOIN t_ctr_product p ON r.ctr_product_id = p.id WHERE s.enterprise_id = #{enterpriseId} AND s.delivery_in_number > 0 AND s.delivery_out_number < s.available_number AND r.rela_type = 'S' AND IF (c1.delivery_mode = 'SX',(IFNULL((SELECT SUM(rr.rela_num) FROM t_stock_contract_rela rr WHERE rr.ctr_product_id = r.ctr_product_id AND rr.rela_type = 'O'),0) < p.deal_number),1 = 1) AND IF (c1.delivery_mode = 'XHHK',(IFNULL((SELECT SUM(rr.rela_num) FROM t_stock_contract_rela rr WHERE rr.ctr_product_id = r.ctr_product_id AND rr.rela_type = 'O'),0) < p.deal_number),1 = 1) AND IF (c1.delivery_mode = 'XKHH',(IFNULL((SELECT SUM(rr.rela_num) FROM t_stock_contract_rela rr WHERE rr.ctr_product_id = r.ctr_product_id AND rr.rela_type = 'O'),0) < p.deal_number OR ((c1.dealed_amount - c1.refund_amount) < (c1.total_amount*(p.deal_number/c1.total_number)))),1 = 1) GROUP BY s.id
ORDER BY s.updated_date DESC

SELECT SUM(s.delivery_in_number) As deliveryInNumber, SUM(s.delivery_out_number) As deliveryOutNumber, SUM(s.available_number) As availableNumber, SUM(s.frozen_number) As frozenNumber FROM t_stock_detail s LEFT JOIN t_ctr_contract c ON s.buy_contract_id = c.id LEFT JOIN t_stock_contract_rela r ON s.stock_contract_id = r.stock_contract_id LEFT JOIN t_ctr_contract c1 ON r.contract_id = c1.id WHERE s.enterprise_id = #{enterpriseId} AND s.delivery_in_number > 0 AND s.delivery_out_number < s.available_number AND r.rela_type = 'S'
select *from t_bs_company_dcsx where dcsx_flg =1 and enable_flg = 1
